queries.title: Search queries
queries.description:
One search query per line. You can use regular keywords or advanced operators like `site:`, `filetype:`, `intitle:`, etc. You can also paste full Google Search URLs.

Examples:
- `best javascript frameworks 2024`
- `site:reddit.com typescript tips`
- `"exact phrase search"`

maxPagesPerQuery.title: Max pages per query
maxPagesPerQuery.description: Number of Google Search result pages to scrape per query. Each page contains up to 10 organic results.

countryCode.title: Country
countryCode.description: Country for the Google Search domain (e.g. `us` → google.com, `de` → google.de, `gb` → google.co.uk). Affects which Google domain is used and the localization of results.

languageCode.title: Interface language
languageCode.description: Language of the Google Search interface (menus, labels). Passed as the `hl` URL parameter. Example: `en`, `de`, `fr`.

searchLanguage.title: Restrict results to language
searchLanguage.description: Restricts search results to pages written in a specific language. Passed as the `lr` URL parameter. Example: `en`, `de`, `fr`. Leave empty to return results in all languages.

mobileResults.title: Mobile results
mobileResults.description: If enabled, uses a mobile User-Agent and returns the mobile version of Google Search results.

forceExactMatch.title: Force exact match
forceExactMatch.description: Wraps the query in quotes to force Google to return exact phrase matches.

site.title: Restrict to site
site.description: Limits results to a specific website using the `site:` operator. Example: `reddit.com`, `wikipedia.org`.

quickDateRange.title: Date range
quickDateRange.description: Filter results by recency. Format: `h[n]` (hours), `d[n]` (days), `w[n]` (weeks), `m[n]` (months), `y[n]` (years). Examples: `d7` (last 7 days), `m3` (last 3 months), `y1` (last year). Leave empty for no date filter.

saveHtml.title: Save raw HTML
saveHtml.description: If enabled, saves the raw HTML of each Google Search results page in the dataset record under the `html` field. Useful for debugging or re-parsing, but significantly increases dataset size.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for the scraper. A proxy is required — Google blocks bare datacenter IPs. Apify datacenter proxies are used by default if left empty. For best results and to avoid CAPTCHAs, use Apify Residential proxies.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of search queries to process in parallel. Keep low (1–5) to reduce the risk of rate limiting.
